heading: World War II home front study
label: 410ggg–2 World War II home front study
text: The Secretary shall conduct a theme study of the World War II home front to determine whether other sites in the United States meet the criteria for potential inclusion in the National Park System in accordance with .section 100507 of title 54
notes: CodificationIn text, “” substituted for “ ()” on authority of , , , which Act enacted Title 54, National Park Service and Related Programs.section 100507 of title 54section 8 of Public Law 91–38316 U.S.C. 1a–5Pub. L. 113–287, § 6(e)128 Stat. 3272Dec. 19, 2014
